Destination 1.summary: Important components of climate science research are also addressed in other Clusters - particularly Cluster 6 – which addresses the climate-ocean-cryosphere-polar nexus and the Climate, Energy and Mobility climate-energy-land-food-water-biodiversity nexus. Expected Outcome: Project results are expected to contribute to all of the following expected outcomes: • Climate data are improved both spatially and temporally, physically more consistent and better exploited across a wide range of users, stakeholders and regions; • EU contribution to climate change assessments and climate monitoring is enhanced; • Climate information distillation is facilitated by innovative methods.
